creator: infofarmer@FreeBSD.org
text:
I experience similar problems, but with M2Crypto.

FWIW, here's a working dependency list:

sat64% pkg_info -rx cjc
Information for cjc-1.0.0:

Depends on:
Dependency: python-2.4.3
Dependency: pkgconfig-0.20_2
Dependency: py24-m2crypto-0.16
Dependency: libiconv-1.9.2_2
Dependency: py24-dnspython-1.4.0
Dependency: libxml2-2.6.26
Dependency: py24-libxml2-2.6.26
Dependency: py24-pyxmpp-1.0.0

Upgrading M2Crypto to 0.16 seems to break it down.

Investigation pending. Thanks for reporting.
